post_halt_resolution.lowered_bar_summary: Phase-5-SKELETON only: 5.1 is the final pre-handover walkthrough by design and its bar is intentionally NOT lowered. Skeleton review confirmed structure, scope, sovereignty/cross-browser/a11y/performance layers, and that failure flags halt on P0+P1 per canonical task_5_1 green criteria. Validation execution scheduled 2026-08-31..09-02 against running sovereign cluster.
